message:
📝 Reorder sidebar: Dashboard, Clusters, Deploy, AI/ML, CI/CD at top (#557)

Reorder the default sidebar navigation to prioritize key dashboards:
1. Dashboard
2. Clusters
3. Deploy
4. AI/ML
5. CI/CD
6. All other dashboards follow

Bump config version to v7 to migrate existing users to new order.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -40,23 +40,25 @@ function subscribe(listener: () => void): () => void {
 }

+  // Priority dashboards at the top
   { id: 'dashboard', name: 'Dashboard', icon: 'LayoutDashboard', href: '/', type: 'link', order: 0 },
   { id: 'clusters', name: 'Clusters', icon: 'Server', href: '/clusters', type: 'link', order: 1 },
